synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-19835 Important: Oracle Linux 8 bind security update
description:
[32:9.11.36-16.6]
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)

[32:9.11.36-16.5]
- Add support for max-records-per-type and max-types-per-name options
  (RHEL-61936)
- Support reading of new options also in named-checkconf -z, v2
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-19835

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-19835.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

Description of changes:

[32:9.11.36-16.6]
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)

[32:9.11.36-16.5]
- Add support for max-records-per-type and max-types-per-name options
  (RHEL-61936)
- Support reading of new options also in named-checkconf -z, v2
